_note: Batch undated_6 — documented parents + full siblings for married-in spouses that had no parents shown. Existing spouse referenced by id (in a children array); parents & new siblings are new SPL_ nodes. Verified July 2026 against Wikipedia. SKIPPED (undocumented/none): ARRHIDAEUSW & HYRCANUS2W (wife name unknown -> parentage unknowable); LIUDOLF (his own parentage is genuinely unknown, as the node label already states); EVE (created, no parents per Genesis 2); ZILPAH (Bible names no parents; only late midrash/Jubilees makes her a daughter of Laban — not documented); ARGOTTA (purely legendary consort of the legendary Pharamond, no documented parentage).

d.c.115 BC · brother, executed by Mithridates VI · Wikipedia

families.note: Laodice, sister-wife of Mithridates VI of Pontus. Her parents Mithridates V Euergetes & Laodice VI already exist as nodes (MITHRIDATES5 / MITHRIDATES5W, bearing Mithridates VI); this appends Laodice & their son Mithridates Chrestus as siblings — no re-parenting. Wikipedia 'Mithridates VI Eupator' / 'Laodice (wife of Mithridates VI)'.

b.label:
Lot's wife
· became a pillar of salt · Genesis 19:26

families.note: Lot's two daughters (Genesis 19). Both already exist as unnamed daughters; this gives them their parents Lot & his wife. LOTDAU1 = elder, LOTDAU2 = younger. Genesis 19:8, 19:26, 19:30-38.
